narratives.evidence_quote: रूस-यूक्रेन युद्ध में परमाणु हथियारों के इस्तेमाल की संभावनाओं को लेकर चिंताएं जारी हैं।
narratives.reasoning: The text opens by stating that concerns about the use of nuclear weapons are ongoing, setting a tone of fear and anxiety about a potential catastrophic escalation of the war.

narratives.evidence_quote: मॉस्को की तरफ से यह चेतावनी भी जारी का जा चुकी है कि अगर अमेरिका और NATO सहयोगी यूक्रेन को लड़ाकू विमान मुहैया कराते हैं, तो वह युद्ध को तेज और इसका विस्तार कर सकता है।
narratives.reasoning: This quote directly reports a warning from Moscow that Western military aid could lead to an intensification and expansion of the war, which is a statement designed to evoke fear about the conflict spreading.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: There is a real possibility that nuclear weapons will be employed
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस-यूक्रेन युद्ध में परमाणु हथियारों के इस्तेमाल की संभावनाओं को लेकर चिंताएं जारी हैं।
subnarratives.reasoning: This opening statement directly frames the article around ongoing concerns and fears regarding the possibility of nuclear weapons being used in the war, actively promoting the idea of a real nuclear threat.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: मॉस्को की तरफ से यह चेतावनी भी जारी का जा चुकी है कि अगर अमेरिका और NATO सहयोगी यूक्रेन को लड़ाकू विमान मुहैया कराते हैं, तो वह युद्ध को तेज और इसका विस्तार कर सकता है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement amplifies war-related fears by warning that specific Western actions (providing fighter jets) could lead to an escalation and expansion of the war. This supports the parent narrative of amplifying fears but does not fit the specific definitions of WW3, Russia attacking other countries, nuclear use, or NATO intervention.

subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly states that concerns about the possibility of nuclear weapons use are ongoing, actively promoting fear and anxiety about nuclear escalation.

subnarratives.reasoning: This statement warns that specific Western military support (providing fighter jets) could lead to an escalation and expansion of the war.
